# comfyui_grok_video_extend_node (Resource)

Extend an existing video with a seamless continuation based on a text prompt. [api node/video/Grok]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Input: COMFY_DYNAMICCOMBO_V3
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 0
- `video` (String) Input: VIDEO (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
